# hetzner-robot_storagebox (Resource)

Manages the name and service toggles of an existing Storage Box.

Storage Boxes themselves are ordered out of band; this resource adopts one by ID and reconciles its configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage the name and service toggles of an existing Storage Box.
resource "hetzner-robot_storagebox" "backup" {
  storagebox_id         = 123456
  name                  = "k8s-backups"
  ssh                   = true
  samba                 = false
  webdav                = false
  external_reachability = true
  zfs                   = false
}
```

Import an existing Storage Box by ID:

```shell
terraform import hetzner-robot_storagebox.backup 123456
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Storage Box name
- `storagebox_id` (Number) Storage Box ID

### Optional

- `external_reachability` (Boolean) Enable external reachability
- `samba` (Boolean) Enable Samba access
- `ssh` (Boolean) Enable SSH access
- `webdav` (Boolean) Enable WebDAV access
- `zfs` (Boolean) Enable ZFS snapshot directory visibility

### Read-Only

- `disk_quota` (Number)
- `disk_usage` (Number)
- `host_system` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `location` (String)
- `login` (String)
- `product` (String)
- `server` (String)
